name: mcdev-mcp
description: MCP server for Minecraft mod development - provides decompiled code access and symbol search
long_description: An MCP server that gives AI assistants access to decompiled Minecraft source code for Fabric modding. Supports browsing classes, methods, packages, searching symbols, finding class hierarchies, and cross-references across multiple Minecraft versions.

tools.name: mc_set_version
tools.description: Set the active Minecraft version for subsequent queries

tools.name: mc_search
tools.description: Search for classes, methods, and fields by name

tools.name: mc_get_class
tools.description: Get the decompiled source code of a class

tools.name: mc_get_method
tools.description: Get the decompiled source of a specific method

tools.name: mc_list_classes
tools.description: List all classes in a package

tools.name: mc_list_packages
tools.description: List all packages in the Minecraft source

tools.name: mc_find_hierarchy
tools.description: Find the class hierarchy (superclasses and subclasses)

tools.name: mc_find_refs
tools.description: Find references to a class or method
